title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾（🦞）为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随用户成长而发展的智能代理项目。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由AI代理管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code/LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察而生成的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
支持多种主流大语言模型
开源项目，易于上手

title: My Homelab AI Dev Platform
content: Article URL: https://rsgm.dev/post/ai-dev-platform/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48542433 Points: 326 # Comments: 54
summary: 作者分享了搭建个人AI开发平台（Homelab）的经验，包括硬件配置、软件栈选择以及开发流程优化，旨在为AI开发者提供低成本、高效率的本地开发环境参考。
highlights: 搭建个人AI开发平台的经验分享
硬件配置与软件栈的选择
开发流程优化与低成本高效率

title: Not everyone is using AI for everything
content: Article URL: https://gabrielweinberg.com/p/people-are-consuming-ai-like-they Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48527700 Points: 505 # Comments: 540
summary: 文章指出并非所有人都在广泛使用AI，人们消费AI的方式类似于早期互联网的采用模式，存在使用差异和局限性。
highlights: Not everyone is using AI for everything
people are consuming AI like they did the early internet

title: Why adding ontologies to LLMs won't yield machine intelligence
summary: 该视频讨论为何将本体论（ontologies）添加到大型语言模型（LLMs）中并不能实现真正的机器智能，指出本体论虽能提供结构化知识，但LLMs缺乏理解与推理能力，无法通过简单添加本体达到人类水平的智能。
highlights: Adding ontologies to LLMs won't yield machine intelligence
Ontologies provide structured knowledge but LLMs lack understanding and reasoning
True machine intelligence requires more than just knowledge injection

title: June Framework Memory and storage pricing updates
content: <p>The 128GB Framework Desktop appreciates a whopping $1,660 today, pricing it at a total of $4,839 now. It was $2,000 at launch.</p> <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/uicwti/june_framework_memory_storage_pricing">Comments</a></p>
summary: Framework Desktop 128GB版本价格从发布时的2000美元大幅上涨至4839美元，涨幅达1660美元，反映了内存市场的波动性。
highlights: The 128GB Framework Desktop appreciates a whopping $1,660 today, pricing it at a total of $4,839 now.
It was $2,000 at launch.

title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
content: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
summary: OpenAI推出合作伙伴网络，投资1.5亿美元助力全球合作伙伴加速企业AI的采用、部署和转型。
highlights: OpenAI launches the Partner Network
investing $150M
accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation

title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
content: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
summary: OpenAI推出了三门学院课程，旨在帮助人们培养实用AI技能、创建可重复的工作流程，并在日常工作中应用智能代理。
highlights: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses
help people build practical AI skills
create repeatable workflows
apply agents in everyday work

title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
summary: Olmo-eval是一个专为模型开发循环设计的评估工作台，旨在简化语言模型的评估流程，支持快速迭代和实验追踪。
highlights: Olmo-eval is designed for the model development loop.
It streamlines evaluation of language models.
Supports rapid iteration and experiment tracking.

title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
summary: 本文是PyTorch性能分析系列的第二部分，重点介绍如何从基本的nn.Linear层出发，通过算子融合技术优化多层感知机（MLP）的性能。文章详细展示了使用PyTorch Profiler进行性能分析的方法，并逐步演示了将多个线性层融合为一个高效内核的过程，最终显著提升MLP的训练和推理速度。
highlights: 从nn.Linear到融合MLP的性能优化路径
使用PyTorch Profiler识别性能瓶颈
算子融合技术显著提升MLP速度
